title: Use of English – 2023 – Admisión Titular B

questions.prompt: My parents can’t afford... so much money for a cruise in Norway.
She... you since you were born.
We had to learn all the poems... heart.
A private detective is looking... the matter from another perspective.
The writer was asked to sign books after her lecture.
answers: They asked the writer to sign books after her lecture

questions.prompt: They say that he is the party’s candidate for the general election.
answers: He is said to be the party’s candidate for the general election
It is said (that) he is the party’s candidate for the general election
It is said he is the party’s candidate for the general election

questions.prompt: I am going to phone Richard back early in the morning.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: When are you going to phone Richard back?

questions.prompt: The typical houses in Amsterdam have a narrow façade. They were cheap to build.
answers: The typical houses in Amsterdam, which were cheap to build, have a narrow façade
The typical houses in Amsterdam, which have a narrow façade, were cheap to build

questions.prompt: Jane probably worked at that hotel last summer.
answers: Jane may have worked at that hotel last summer

manualCorrection.structure: if / in case / unless + subject + present simple / present continuous

questions.prompt: We have never met anyone as famous as he is.
answers: He is the most famous person (that) we have ever met
He is the most famous person we have ever met

questions.prompt: I would rather to work from home than coming to the office.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: I would rather work from home than come to the office
Let’s order some pizza,” Jake said / told us
“Why don’t we order some pizza?” Jake said / told us

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: everything / not / it / to / is / remember / read / possible / we
answers: It is not possible to remember everything we read
